# Yanina Chizhevskaya — White Label AI Product Owner

> Personal website of Yanina Chizhevskaya — Product Owner, technical leader and developer building White Label subscription applications and AI products for health, wellness and FemTech audiences. Working with clients in Russia, UK and US.

## Who

Янина Чижевская (Yanina Chizhevskaya) — Product Owner and AI Product Engineer with 10 years in product and digital, including 6 years as technical director of four health education businesses. Specializes in taking White Label and AI products from market research and unit economics to code, launch, analytics and support. Worked with teams and contractors up to 30 people and with products in Russia, UK and US.

Education: Tomsk State University (Product Manager in IT), Kuzbass State Technical University (engineer).

## Services

The primary service is a White Label subscription application under the client's brand. Current formats:

1. **White Label Fit (5 working days)** — audience, recurring problem, rough economics and recommendation of the right package. Price: 0 RUB for the first 3 qualified projects per month.

2. **Product Blueprint (14 working days)** — market and audience research + value proposition + CJM + clickable prototype + unit economics + AI scenario and risks + Lite PRD + launch estimate. Price: 150,000 RUB. Credited in full toward development when the client continues to White Label Start or White Label + AI.

3. **White Label Start (4–6 weeks)** — one application, one primary scenario and one launch channel, with Product Blueprint, branding, frontend, backend, onboarding, billing, core analytics and 14 days of stabilization. AI is not included. Total price: from 350,000 RUB including Product Blueprint.

4. **White Label + AI (6–10 weeks)** — everything in Start plus one primary AI scenario, knowledge base, guardrails, fallback, content admin, retention notifications, AI telemetry, cost controls and 30 days of support. Price: from 550,000 RUB.

5. **Custom Web SaaS** — multiple roles, integrations, AI scenarios or special security requirements. Custom phased estimate after Blueprint/discovery. After launch: Care from 60,000 RUB/month; Growth with product analytics and experiments from 80,000 RUB/month. Revenue-share partnerships are considered separately for selected experts with an active audience.

## Cases (live AI products)

- **Periya / Перия (@PeriyaApp_bot, periya.pro)** — wellness Telegram Mini App for women 35+: personalized nutrition and training plans with cycle-adaptive logic, AI photo calorie estimation. React 19 + Node + Prisma + PostgreSQL + Claude API. In production.

- **MindBodyFace (mindbodyface.com)** — international face fitness, facial massage, natural facial rejuvenation platform and mobile app. US/UK/EU market. 2024-2025.

- **BreathFlow (@BreathFlowAI_bot)** — Telegram Mini App for breathing practices: 4 techniques (Wim Hof, 4-4-4-4, 4-7-8, Buteyko), Web Audio API with binaural beats, Telegram CloudStorage. In production.

- **Biogenom** — MVP of nutrition mobile app, B2C/B2B2C, 2022-2023.

- **Lookbook AI (look-ai.ru / room.look-ai.ru)** — AI stylist and virtual try-on, dual-provider AI architecture (Claude + Gemini). In testing.

- **Corporate AI agents** — neurocopywriter, GPTs sales bot, support chat bot in international company. Reduced department FOT by 50%, reduced onboarding time by 30%.

## Stack

- AI: Claude Code, Cursor, Lovable, Google AI Studio, Gemini API, Claude API, OpenAI GPTs, NotebookLM, MCP servers, N8N
- Frontend: React + TypeScript, Next.js, Tailwind, shadcn/ui
- Backend: Node + Express, Prisma + PostgreSQL, Supabase
- Deploy: Vercel, Timeweb VPS
- Apps: Telegram Mini Apps, Telegram Stars, YooKassa
- Analytics: Yandex Metrika, Google Analytics 4, PostHog, Amplitude, Mixpanel
- Design: Figma, Figma MCP
- Other: Python + FFmpeg, Playwright

## Target audience

- Health, wellness, longevity bloggers and experts (audience 50,000+)
- Online schools in nutrition, fitness, psychology
- FemTech and women's health startups
- Clinics and medical businesses
- Companies wanting to implement AI internally

## Pages

- [Home](https://chizhevskaya.pro/) — main portfolio, services, cases, lead magnet form
- [Стоимость](https://chizhevskaya.pro/services) — цены и состав White Label Fit, Product Blueprint, White Label Start, White Label + AI, Custom SaaS и сопровождения
- [Каталог White Label решений](https://chizhevskaya.pro/services/mini-apps-for-bloggers) — интерактивный каталог из 44 концепций приложений для экспертов, врачей, клиник, нутрициологов, фитнес-тренеров, реабилитологов, гинекологов, психологов, коучей и онлайн-школ. Первый запуск — одно приложение под одну задачу и основной канал; второе или третье приложение оплачивается отдельно. AI-функции встраиваются внутрь выбранного приложения, а Web SaaS на собственном домене является более дорогим дополнительным форматом. Визуалы обозначены как примеры интерфейса, а не как готовые продукты.
- [Products](https://chizhevskaya.pro/products) — own Mini Apps and AI products including Periya and BreathFlow
- [Partnerships](https://chizhevskaya.pro/partnerships) — white-label and revenue-share launch models for bloggers and experts
- [Cases](https://chizhevskaya.pro/cases) — client and product-management cases in SaaS, wellness, HealthTech and corporate AI
- [Blog](https://chizhevskaya.pro/blog) — practical articles about AI products, Mini Apps, subscription economics and HealthTech product analytics
- [About](https://chizhevskaya.pro/about) — Yanina Chizhevskaya's experience, specialization and product-development approach
- [Contact](https://chizhevskaya.pro/contact) — Telegram, VK, MAX and email contact options
- [Resume](https://chizhevskaya.pro/resume.html) — detailed work history (HTML/PDF)
